failure.symptom: Umbrel Dashboard requires Bitcoin/Lightning node backend APIs. Frontend starts on :8080 but all blockchain data comes from backend. Bug confirmed via source: transition-group formatting and removal of unused <status> component, primarily cosmetic diff.
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 Bitcoin/Lightning 后端。Fix diff 主要是 template 格式化 + 移除未使用的 status 组件
